docs.title: Project PANOPTES Documentation
docs.text:
Welcome to the central documentation hub for Project PANOPTES. Use the links below to explore the various software components.

  • panoptes-utils

    Astronomical utilities for the PANOPTES ecosystem, including image processing, configuration management, and hardware communication.

    Documentation

  • POCS

    The PANOPTES Observatory Control System (POCS) core software. The main software driver responsible for high-level control of a unit.

    Documentation
